scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm ci --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm ci --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && npm run start:prod --prefix backend
